description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a realistic human form, featuring a naturalistic head, torso, arms, and legs. The figure is dressed in fitted, modern clothing, including a jacket or coat with a structured collar and long sleeves, and tailored pants. The shoes are low-profile and appear suitable for walking in an urban environment. The head is topped with short, neatly styled hair, and the overall build is proportional and athletic. No accessories or carried items are visible, and the posture is upright and relaxed, suggesting a neutral standing pose.
description: A realistically proportioned adult pedestrian in modern, fitted clothing with short, neat hair and an upright, relaxed stance.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the face, chest, and front of the legs, with arms at the sides and the head clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, the contour of the torso, and the side of the legs and arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with the overall silhouette and posture evident.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with the side of the face, torso, and legs visible.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted jacket or coat with long sleeves and tailored pants
